word: H749 - אֲרַךְ - ʼărak - ar-ak' - Be meet

sections.paragraph:
Original: ארך

Transliteration: 'ărak

Phonetic: ar-ak'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Peal) to be long, reach, meet (verb)
  2. fitting, proper (adjectival verb)

Origin: properly, corresponding to H748, but used only in the sense of reaching to a given point

TWOT entry: 2607

Part(s) of speech:
